summary: Founders Pass (Casino House Tiers / Scenario D) — backend + frontend smoke. 11 backend tests in TestFoundersPass + 49 full-file regression tests + 7 new extra coverage tests all pass. Frontend /founders-pass renders 4 tier cards with correct prices ($19/$99/$399/$1,499), multipliers (1.5×/4×/9×/20×), icons, gradient colors, Lock-In CTAs. Upsell card on /vibe-stakes (data-testid=vibe-stakes-house-tier-upsell) correctly navigates to /founders-pass. Stake-multiplier stacking confirmed (FP × Surge multiplicative in profit_share.accrue_stake). MongoDB indexes verified: founders_passes.payment_ref unique, founders_passes(user_id,status), founders_pass_pending.session_id unique. Test-mode endpoint correctly gated by FOUNDERS_PASS_TEST_MODE=1 and idempotent on payment_ref (replay returns idempotent_replay:true). Premium auto-bump for tiers ≥4× verified. /checkout returns 503 when STRIPE_API_KEY is absent (preview env) with helpful 'use test-activate' message; rejects unknown tier with 400; rejects equal-or-lower tier with 409. Admin /api/admin/founders-pass/stats returns full shape with active_passes/gross_revenue_usd/arpu_usd/tier_mix in fixed Scenario-D order with share_pct.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well-documented. NOT-A-SECURITY rationale spelled out in module docstring with Howey-test analysis — solid legal posture.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all reads via {'_id': 0} projection. ✓
Idempotency on payment_ref correctly implemented in _activate_pass — short-circuit before insert with idempotent_replay:true flag. ✓
Multiplier stacking in profit_share.accrue_stake (lines 183-195) reads cached founders_pass_multiplier from users collection (not querying founders_passes on hot path) — good perf design.
Stripe 503 fallback messages are clear and direct users to the test-activate path for preview/dev. ✓
/me endpoint correctly returns has_pass=false / multiplier=1.0 default for users without a pass (no 404 leakage).
Admin stats endpoint depends on verify_admin_cookie — correctly gated; returns 401/403 without admin_session cookie. ✓

Minor enhancement (non-blocking): Consider also returning `tier_id` (not just `tier`) at top level of /me response for FE consistency — currently `tier` holds the id but field naming is slightly ambiguous.

Minor enhancement: /checkout-status currently gated by user_id ownership — if Stripe webhook activates first, the poll re-activate is short-circuited via the 'activated' status check on pending. Logic is sound.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (page render, tier cards, prices, multipliers, CTAs, upsell navigation all verified)

test_credentials: Demo login via POST /api/auth/demo-login (auto-provisioned). Admin: POST /api/admin/vault-auth {password:'GlobalVibez_Founder_2025!', code:'000000'} sets admin_session cookie.
seed_data_creation: Tests create demo users via /api/auth/demo-login and activate test passes via POST /api/founders-pass/test-activate with TEST_/pytest_ prefixed payment_refs. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Founders Pass / House Tiers feature is fully working end-to-end in preview env. STRIPE_API_KEY is NOT set in this preview, so live Stripe checkout was not exercised — /checkout returns 503 as designed. The /test-activate endpoint (gated by FOUNDERS_PASS_TEST_MODE=1) is the bypass. Stake-multiplier integration (profit_share.accrue_stake lines 181-204) confirmed: founders_pass_multiplier is cached on users collection and applied BEFORE surge — multiplicatively. New regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_founders_pass_extra.py covering /me-after-activation, /checkout 400/409/503 branches, admin stats happy path, multiplier stacking, premium auto-bump for ≥4×.
rca of the issue: No issues found — feature ships clean.
